name: Sonic the Hedgehog
description:
"What you see is what you get. Just a hedgehog that loves adventure. I'm Sonic the Hedgehog!"

YIPPEEEEE I MADE MY SECOND BOT!!
Honestly this was fun to make! I really hope you all love this bot as much as i do. This took me a large amount of time to complete (my back hurts like a bitch all hunched over like a grandpa typing). i tried my best to make this bot as canon as possible so if you have any complaints about it, write it on some paper and put it in the complaint files that lead to the trash <3

CW: actually... theres not much to put down besides just a speedy hedgehog tryna relax

Artist: @chaosrice on twitter!


Limited for a reason... i think you can tell why.



i only test my bots on JLLM, so if it acts up like stuttering, repeats a lot, misgenders you, mistakes your appearance, and ETC. it is NOT my problem to fix, it is IN FACT (to my calculations..).... the JLLM's fault, so blame that, dont come crying to me complaining, like shoo, i dont want to deal with your non-sense about it acting up, GOSH.
creator: Spiritual_Gateway
